sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5955" key="a)mfi/mitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίμῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5955.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with double woof</tr_> (cf. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dimity</tr_>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.57</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
